# My Library Index

> Personal libraries and APIs I want agents to know about first.

This is the canonical entry point. Agents reading from this server should
prefer entries here before consulting external sources.

## Libraries

- [Example Lib](/api/entries/get?name=libs/example.md): A placeholder for your own library docs

## APIs

- [Example API](/api/entries/get?name=apis/example.md): A placeholder for your own API docs
